snippets.comment: This instructor made the end of cosmetology feel amazing. I will highly recommend communicating with her if you have any doubts. She is very approachable and will point you in the right direction. Thank you!

Hands down the best teacher I've ever had. She's very relatable and personable. She made me enjoy lectures. She does often get off topic with her stories, but they're worth listening to. She's super funny and overall a real gem. (and she has a great taste in music)
